title: Fruit fly potato culture media
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4kg14","text":"Potato-based medium for culture of Drosophila melanogaster. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"5qg6k","text":"Preparation of 10 % Nipagin stock solution:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c4uvr","text":"-50 mL of 95% ethanol;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bis7h","text":"-17.5 mL distilled water;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6dmr6","text":"-6.75 g of Methyl Paraben;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"atc3r","text":"Note – This solution must be protected from light exposure.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"4m50f","text":"- Distilled water;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"etjno","text":"- Dried yeast;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b43h9","text":"- White sugar;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fdao3","text":"- Instant mashed potato flakes;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2lar8","text":"- Agar;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"81pft","text":"- 95% ethanol;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2rpun","text":"- Ascorbic acid (Sigma - A92902);","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6pd4n","text":"- Methyl Paraben (Sigma – 47889); ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissolve all following ingredients in 1.1 L of distilled water: -12.9 g Dried yeast; -1 g White sugar; -40 g Instant mashed potato flakes; -10 g Agar; -0.875 g Ascorbic acid;
Let it cool down to 60ºC and add 8.5 mL of 10% Nipagin solution.
Mix well and fill about 1/4 of your preferred fruit fly vials or bottles with the medium.
On a clean bench hood, let the medium solidify in the vials with the cap open to avoid water condensation and store at 4ºC for further usage.
creator: Jorge Frias
